summary: All 3 revision 13 fixes verified via live browser testing. All regressions from previous cycles confirmed passing. One architectural note documented for FIX-13-1 (circular dependency in max-height formula produces conservative but functional value).

fixes.description: Mobile menu max-height: JS computes --menu-max-height as window.innerHeight - header.getBoundingClientRect().top - header.offsetHeight, clamped to min 200px. CSS uses menu-open:max-h-(--menu-max-height).
fixes.evidence: At 375px, scrollY=500 (header fixed at top=32): cssVar=512px, navMaxHeight=512px, headerBottom=602, navBottom=586, viewportHeight=900, fitsInViewport=true, overflow=-314px. Menu fully visible within viewport with 314px clearance. navOverflowY=auto ensures scrollability if content exceeds constraint.
fixes.note: Formula has a known circular dependency: header.offsetHeight includes the nav constrained by the current --menu-max-height, so the computed value is conservative on repeated opens within the same session (observed: 298px on second open vs 512px on fresh open). Practical impact: menu is always contained within viewport and scrollable; the constraint is never dangerously small (200px floor enforced).

fixes.description: Hamburger visibility: Removed **:w-full **:h-auto from button, added w-full to span wrappers instead.
fixes.evidence: At 375px (closed state): toggleDisplay=block, toggleVisibility=visible, toggleColor=rgb(255,255,255), toggleWidth=28px, toggleHeight=16px. spanOpenDisplay=block, spanOpenWidth=28px. Hamburger icon (3 lines) clearly visible as white on dark charcoal background in screenshot.

fixes.description: Padding closed state: Reverted to menu-open:pt-4 menu-open:pb-8 with transition-[max-height,opacity,padding].
fixes.evidence: CLOSED: navPaddingTop=0px, navPaddingBottom=0px, navMaxHeight=0px, navOpacity=0, menuOpen=false — no padding when closed. OPEN: navPaddingTop=16px (pt-4), navPaddingBottom=32px (pb-8), navOpacity=1, menuOpen=true — correct padding present. Transition includes padding so no jump on state change.

regressions.description: Tab to nav items shows white dotted outline (dotted, not dashed)
regressions.evidence: 6 Tab presses to .header-main-item-button: outlineStyle=dotted, outlineColor=rgb(255,255,255), outlineWidth=2px, isNavBtn=true.

regressions.description: ArrowDown opens submenu and moves focus to first sub-item with correct outline
regressions.evidence: ArrowDown from About button: tag=A, text=Who We Are, outlineStyle=dotted, outlineColor=rgb(255,255,255), btnExpanded=true.

regressions.description: Escape closes submenu and returns focus to parent button
regressions.evidence: Escape from sub-item: focused=BUTTON:About, btnAriaExpanded=false, submenuHidden=true.

regressions.description: body.css *:focus-visible in @layer base allows Tailwind utilities to override (FQA-005)
regressions.evidence: Header nav items show white dotted outline; global @layer base rule correctly overridden by Tailwind @layer utilities.

codeReviewNotes: HeaderMain.js lines 55-62: updateMenuMaxHeight() formula confirmed: window.innerHeight - rect.top - header.offsetHeight, Math.max(200, Math.floor(available)) + 'px', set on header element as --menu-max-height
HeaderMain.js line 147: updateMenuMaxHeight() called on scroll when menu is open and on mobile
HeaderMain.js line 271: updateMenuMaxHeight() called in openMenu() before fixedScrollMobile check
HeaderMain.php line 127: hamburger button class='md:hidden cursor-pointer w-7 transition-colors text-white ...' — no **:w-full **:h-auto
HeaderMain.php lines 132-133: span wrappers have w-full class
HeaderMain.php line 142: nav has menu-open:pt-4 menu-open:pb-8 and max-md:transition-[max-height,opacity,padding]
validate_all: PASS (0 errors, 9 warnings — all pre-existing)
